paper_title: PAWS-X: A Cross-lingual Adversarial Dataset for Paraphrase Identification
evaluation_method: Binary classification: given two sentences, determine if they are paraphrases (1) or not (0). Adversarial pairs with high lexical overlap but different semantics. 23,659 human-translated evaluation pairs across 6 languages (French, Spanish, German, Chinese, Japanese, Korean). In lm-eval-harness: output_type=multiple_choice, log-likelihood comparison over two choices.
